issues.description: Second KO action is unconditional, but card text states it should only occur 'If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more'. Missing condition: HasCardOnBoard with costFilter >= 8
Second effect (Trigger with DrawCard/TrashFromHand) has no basis in card text. Card effect is a single Main effect with conditional KO options only.

Second KO action should be mutually exclusive with first (select 'instead'), not both executed. Structure should use conditional logic: if HasCardOnBoard(cost>=8), allow maxCost:6 option; otherwise use maxCost:4 option.
